phase: gen-3 partial (2/9); recovery run building remaining 7

gen3.incident: A harness/state/tasks.json edit (commit a92005b) broke a brittle e2e (ops.spec.ts hardcoded 'launching gen-2'), turning main CI red, so 7 gen-3 units correctly refused to merge red and the dep chain collapsed. m9-hardening fixed the test to read the live phase from tasks.json at runtime; main is green again (1959 tests). Lesson: the /ops page + its e2e render live tasks.json — now robust to phase-string changes.
gen3.recoveryNote: PRs #49/#51 (pe-lifecycle/benchmark) were correct but conflicted with m9-hardening's App.tsx code-splitting rewrite; closed and rebuilding all 7 fresh against healthy main.

reviewBots: CodeRabbit + Greptile at/near trial limits; gate = CI + independent adversarial review + visual QA
